CREATE TABLE requests (id UInt32, header_name String, header_value String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT getClientHTTPHeader('User-Agent') FROM requests WHERE id = 1;
SELECT getClientHTTPHeader('Content-Type') FROM (SELECT header_value FROM requests WHERE header_name = 'Content-Type') AS subquery;
SELECT id, getClientHTTPHeader(header_name) FROM requests WHERE header_name IN ('User-Agent', 'Content-Type');
CREATE TABLE headers (request_id UInt32, header_name String, header_value String) ENGINE = Distributed('cluster', 'default', 'requests', rand());
SELECT getClientHTTPHeader('User-Agent') FROM (SELECT * FROM headers) AS distributed_headers;
SET allow_get_client_http_header = 1; SELECT getClientHTTPHeader('User-Agent') FROM requests WHERE id = 1;
SELECT getClientHTTPHeader('Set-Cookie') FROM requests WHERE id = 1;
SELECT getClientHTTPHeader('X-ClickHouse-Custom') FROM requests WHERE id = 2 HAVING header_value = 'some_value';
SELECT getClientHTTPHeader('User-Agent') FROM (SELECT header_value FROM requests GROUP BY header_name) AS grouped_headers;
WITH (SELECT getClientHTTPHeader('User-Agent')) AS user_agent FROM requests WHERE id = 1;
SELECT getClientHTTPHeader(header_name) FROM requests WHERE header_name = ANY(['User-Agent', 'Content-Type']);
